series_metadata.series_title: Cell Phone and Telephone Use Logs
series_metadata.series_description: Logs generated to ensure OIT Policy compliance with the use of State owned cell phones and telephones by agency staff. Records may include the Cellular Group Sign In/out Log, Record of Personal Cellular Calls Log, contractor use log and any additional log or record generated for a similar purpose.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain logs for six (6) months following the last date documented on the log and then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain logs for six (6) months following the last date documented on the log and then destroy., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
